name: Saving Atlantis
author: Ash
bootlegger: Princess and Leviathan: On your first day, if you nominate and execute a player other than yourself, they register as evil to the Leviathan's ability.
Cannibal and Princess: If the Cannibal nominates and executes the Princess, the Cannibal uses the jinxed Princess ability.
Cannibal and Village Idiot: If a self-drunk Village Idiot is executed, then the Cannibal gains that Village Idiot's ability and drunk status simultaneously.
Monk and Leviathan: The player protected by the monk is safe from all evil abilities. Ignore the official jinx.
